glosses.ja: 生クリーム; クリーム

translations.es: Hoy compro crema de leche fresca.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, j'achète de la crème fraîche.
translations.pt: Hoje vou comprar creme de leite fresco.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi mua kem tươi.
translations.hi: आज मैं ताज़ा क्रीम खरीद रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag kjøper jeg fersk fløte.
translations.id: Hari ini saya membeli krim segar.
translations.sv: I dag köper jag färsk grädde.
translations.da: I dag køber jeg frisk fløde.
translations.ja: 今日は生クリームを買います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Temporal adverb specifying time.
Attributive adjective, accusative masculine singular, modifying 'Rahm'.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object.

sentences.target: Du holst den Rahm aus dem Kühlschrank.
sentences.reading: /duː hoːlst deːn ʁaːm aʊ̯s deːm ˈkyːlʃʁaŋk/

translations.de: Du holst den Rahm aus dem Kühlschrank.
translations.ipa: /duː hoːlst deːn ʁaːm aʊ̯s deːm ˈkyːlʃʁaŋk/
translations.en: You get the cream from the fridge.
translations.es: Sacas la crema de leche del refrigerador.
translations.fr: Tu sors la crème du frigo.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把鲜奶油从冰箱里拿出来。
translations.pt: Você pega o creme de leite na geladeira.
translations.vi: Bạn lấy kem từ tủ lạnh.
translations.nl: Je pakt de room uit de koelkast.
translations.hi: তुम फ्रिज से क्रीम निकालते हो.
translations.el: Βγάζεις την κρέμα γάλακτος από το ψυγείο.
translations.da: Du tager fløden ud af køleskabet.
translations.ja: 冷蔵庫から生クリームを取り出します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Rahm'.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object.
Preposition governing dative, introducing the source.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kühlschrank'.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'aus'.

sentences.target: Der Kuchen wird mit Rahm serviert.

translations.de: Der Kuchen wird mit Rahm serviert.
translations.en: The cake is served with cream.
translations.es: El pastel se sirve con crema de leche.
translations.fr: Le gâteau est servi avec de la crème.
translations.it: La torta viene servita con panna.
translations.zh-Hans: 蛋糕会配鲜奶油一起上桌。
translations.pt: O bolo é servido com creme de leite.
translations.vi: Bánh được phục vụ kèm kem.
translations.nl: De taart wordt met room geserveerd.
translations.hi: केक क्रीम के साथ परोसा जाता है.
translations.el: Το κέικ σερβίρεται με κρέμα γάλακτος.
translations.ja: ケーキは生クリームと一緒に提供されます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kuchen'.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject.
Auxiliary 'werden' forming the present passive, 3rd person singular.
Preposition governing dative, marking accompaniment/instrument.
Common noun, dative singular after 'mit'; complement of the preposition.
Past participle; lexical verb in the passive construction.

sentences.target: Im Café kostet der Kakao mit Rahm extra.
sentences.reading: /ɪm kaˈfeː ˈkɔstət deːɐ̯ kaˈkaːoː mɪt ʁaːm ˈɛkstʁa/

translations.de: Im Café kostet der Kakao mit Rahm extra.
translations.ipa: /ɪm kaˈfeː ˈkɔstət deːɐ̯ kaˈkaːoː mɪt ʁaːm ˈɛkstʁa/
translations.en: At the café, cocoa with cream costs extra.
translations.es: En la cafetería, el chocolate caliente con crema de leche tiene un costo adicional.
translations.fr: Au café, le cacao avec de la crème coûte plus cher.
translations.it: Al bar, il cacao con panna costa di più.
translations.ko: 카페에서는 생크림을 올린 코코아가 추가 요금이에요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在咖啡馆，热可可加奶油要另收费。
translations.yue: 喺咖啡店，熱朱古力加忌廉要另加錢。
translations.ru: В кафе какао со сливками стоит дороже.
translations.pt: No café, o chocolate quente com creme de leite custa mais.
translations.he: בקפה, קקאו עם שמנת כרוך בתוספת תשלום.
translations.vi: Ở quán cà phê, ca cao có kem sẽ tính thêm tiền.
translations.ar: في المقهى، الكاكاو مع الكريمة يكلّف مبلغًا إضافيًا.
translations.nl: In het café kost cacao met room extra.
translations.uk: У кав’ярні какао з вершками коштує дорожче.
translations.hu: A kávézóban a tejszínes kakaó feláras.
translations.hi: कैफ़े में क्रीम वाला कोकोआ पर अतिरिक्त शुल्क लगता है.
translations.pl: W kawiarni kakao ze śmietanką kosztuje więcej.
translations.el: Στο καφέ, το κακάο με κρέμα γάλακτος χρεώνεται επιπλέον.
translations.nb: På kafé koster kakao med krem ekstra.
translations.id: Di kafe, kakao dengan krim dikenakan biaya tambahan.
translations.sv: På kaféet kostar kakao med grädde extra.
translations.ro: La cafenea, cacao cu frișcă costă în plus.
translations.cs: V kavárně je kakao se smetanou za příplatek.
translations.da: På caféen koster kakao med fløde ekstra.
translations.ja: カフェでは、クリーム入りのココアは追加料金です。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition with fused definite article, governing dative.
Common noun, dative singular; object of 'im'.

Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kakao' (subject).

Common noun, dative singular; complement of 'mit'.
Adverb meaning 'at additional charge', modifying 'kostet'.
